violations.text: Cookies, cereal, and baked goods packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2025
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the beverage area. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024
The deli display case was not in good repair, nonfunctional at time of inspection. Deli display case must be repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2024

Sliced tomatoes and chicken observed held at 45-49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. Discussed not blocking refrigerator air flow, and monitoring food temperatures. Service was contacted during inspection to confirm it was not a refrigerator issue. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2023
The dump sink in the cafe is in poor repair, dripping into a bucket in the cupboard beneath the sink. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2023

The cabinet beneath the dump sink in the care has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2023
